latest.title: Inflation likely to stay ‘significantly above target,’ top European central banker warns
latest.summary: Joachim Nagel, president of Germany’s Bundesbank, spoke to CNBC on the sidelines of an ECB conference in Portugal.

latest.title: Heavy security deployed in South Africa ahead of anti-migrant protests
latest.summary: Thousands of people have left South Africa ahead of Tuesday's deadline set by anti-migrant groups.

latest.title: 'We can't continue like this': Inquiry demands NHS maternity overhaul
latest.summary: An independent inquiry into England's maternity services has found "unacceptable racism and discrimination" is affecting patient safety.

latest.title: Scientists may have finally found how Alzheimer's spreads through the brain

radar.title: French biotech stock soars 31% after new data on experimental medicine
radar.summary: Shares of French biotech company Abivax soared Tuesday after it released fresh data on its lead drug for bowel disease.

radar.title: Buffett delays annual donation to Gates Foundation pending review of Jeffrey Epstein ties:…
radar.summary: This comes as the foundation continues to review its ties to the late sex offender Jeffery Epstein.

radar.title: Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to 10 years in jail for corruption
radar.summary: The case against Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim stemmed from a laptop deal during his term as Indonesia's education minister.
